features: 7-piece manicure and pedicure kit includes nail clippers, eyebrow trimmer, tweezers, cuticle pusher, nail file, and grooming tools for complete nail and facial care.
Professional-grade stainless steel tools offer precision, durability, and rust resistance, making this nail care set long-lasting and easy to maintain.
Compact travel manicure set comes in a stylish pink PU leather case, perfect for travel, handbag, suitcase, or daily use at home and on the go.
Multipurpose nail grooming kit is ideal for trimming fingernails and toenails, shaping eyebrows, cleaning cuticles, and maintaining overall hand and foot hygiene.
Lightweight and portable nail care kit suitable for women, men, teens, and beauty lovers who want salon-quality results anywhere, anytime.
Great gift idea for women, girls, moms, girlfriends, and travelers. Ideal for birthdays, holidays, Mother’s Day, or as a self-care gift set.
description: Product description Elevate your personal grooming routine with this comprehensive 7-in-1 manicure set from Sasha. Crafted from premium stainless steel, this professional-grade kit includes everything you need for impeccable nail care. The set features precision nail clippers, eyebrow trimmer for detailed trimming, professional tweezers for precise hair removal, and a quality nail file for smooth finishing touches. All tools are housed in an elegant pink PU leather case that's both stylish and practical, making it perfect for organised storage at home or convenient grooming on the go. The compact design ensures it fits easily in your travel bag or bathroom cabinet, while the durable construction promises lasting performance. Whether you're maintaining your everyday grooming routine or preparing for special occasions, this versatile manicure set delivers salon-quality results in the comfort of your own space. Safety Warning Keep out of reach of children.
